name: Path Problem Skeleton
description: Base skeleton for Python path-problem queries with VulnConfig placeholder.

name: Django Redirect Template
description: Specialised snippet for detecting user-controlled redirect targets.
notes: Import helper predicates calleeIsName, calleeIsAttr, receiverLooksLikeDjangoShortcuts, isRedirectCall. Source is RemoteFlowSource; sink is first argument to redirect-like call.

name: Eval Injection Template
description: Detects user-controlled expressions flowing into eval/exec style sinks (builtins, pandas, PIL).
notes: Use helper predicates calleeIsName, calleeIsAttr, attrReceiverIsLikelyEvalCarrier. Sink targets call.getArg(0) for eval/exec family.

name: File Read Path Traversal Template
description: Detects user-controlled paths flowing into open() file read operations, leading to arbitrary file read vulnerabilities.
notes: Source can be dictionary.get('key'), function parameters, or RemoteFlowSource. Sink is open(path, mode) where mode is 'rb', 'r', etc. Use file/function scoping for precision.

name: Langchain Dictionary Get Source Template
description: Template for detecting dictionary.get() calls (e.g., kwargs.get('path')) as sources in Langchain-style template formatting.
notes: Source pattern: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call, DataFlow::AttrRead attr | call.getFunction() = attr and attr.getAttributeName() = 'get' and call.getArg(0).asExpr().(StringLiteral).getText() = 'key' and receiverIsName(call, 'kwargs')). Combine with file/function scoping.

name: Additional Flow Through Attribute Calls Template
description: Template for tracking taint through attribute method calls (e.g., obj.image_to_data_url(path)).
notes: Use isAdditionalFlowStep to propagate taint: from path argument → attribute call result → next function argument. Pattern: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call | isAttrCallWithName(call, 'method_name') and src = call.getArg(0) and dst = call).
